title: cli.rs duplicates hex_encode instead of using crate::api::hex_encode
description: cli.rs line 285-287 defines its own private `fn hex_encode` with the same byte-by-byte format!() implementation as api.rs line 24-26. The api.rs version is already pub. cli.rs should use `crate::api::hex_encode` (or a shared utility). What goes wrong: code duplication—any fix to the encoding (e.g. switching to a faster hex crate as suggested in smallhold-9ouq.6) must be applied in two places or they silently diverge.
